allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\fredr\\.booking"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \($proc.HasExited\) { "FAILED with code: $\($proc.ExitCode\)" } else { "Server running, PID: $\($proc.Id\)" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\fredr\\.booking"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \($proc.HasExited\) { "FEIL: $\($proc.ExitCode\)" } else { "OK, PID $\($proc.Id\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\fredr\\.booking"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \($proc.HasExited\) { "FEIL" } else { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/bookings"; "OK - bookings: $\($r.Count\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force })
